args.code: (()=>{const nav=document.querySelector('nav');const allNavBtns=nav?Array.from(nav.querySelectorAll('button,a')):[];const btnDetails=allNavBtns.map((b,i)=>{const s=getComputedStyle(b);const childSpans=b.querySelectorAll('span');const pro=Array.from(childSpans).find(s=>s.textContent.trim()==='PRO');return {index:i,text:b.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g,' '),bg:s.backgroundColor,color:s.color,br:s.borderRadius,padding:s.padding,fontSize:s.fontSize,gap:s.gap,display:s.display,alignItems:s.alignItems,proBadge:pro?{bg:getComputedStyle(pro).backgroundColor,color:getComputedStyle(pro).color,br:getComputedStyle(pro).borderRadius,padding:getComputedStyle(pro).padding,fontSize:getComputedStyle(pro).fontSize}:null}});const activeBtn=allNavBtns.find(b=>{const c=b.className||'';return c.includes('active')||c.includes('selected')||getComputedStyle(b).borderBottom!=='0px none rgba(0,0,0,0)';});const imgs=nav?Array.from(nav.querySelectorAll('img')):[];const imgDetails=imgs.map(img=>({src:img.src,naturalWidth:img.naturalWidth,naturalHeight:img.naturalHeight,className:img.className}));const navInnerDivs=nav?Array.from(nav.querySelectorAll('div')):[];const divDetails=navInnerDivs.slice(0,6).map((d,i)=>({index:i,className:d.className,display:getComputedStyle(d).display,gap:getComputedStyle(d).gap,padding:getComputedStyle(d).padding,alignItems:getComputedStyle(d).alignItems}));const toggleBtn=document.querySelector('button[aria-label*=\"language\"],button[class*=\"toggle\"],button img');const toggle=document.querySelector('button img');const toggleParent=toggle?toggle.parentElement:null;return JSON.stringify({btnDetails,activeBtn:activeBtn?{text:activeBtn.textContent.trim(),bg:getComputedStyle(activeBtn).backgroundColor,color:getComputedStyle(activeBtn).color,br:getComputedStyle(activeBtn).borderRadius,padding:getComputedStyle(activeBtn).padding,fontSize:getComputedStyle(activeBtn).fontSize,borderBottom:getComputedStyle(activeBtn).borderBottom}:null,imgDetails,divDetails,toggleParent:toggleParent?{tag:toggleParent.tagName,className:toggleParent.className,text:toggleParent.textContent.trim().slice(0,30),bg:getComputedStyle(toggleParent).backgroundColor,br:getComputedStyle(toggleParent).borderRadius,padding:getComputedStyle(toggleParent).padding}:null});})()
